issues.description: Action type is KO but effect text says 'Place at the bottom of the owner's deck', which should be ReturnToHand with bottomOfDeck parameter or a deck-bottom action type
Action type is KO but effect text says 'Place at the bottom of the owner's deck', which should be ReturnToHand with bottomOfDeck parameter or a deck-bottom action type
TrashFromHand filter restricts to Character cards only, but official text says 'trash 1 card from your hand' without card type restriction
First target should allow choosing 'your opponent's Characters' (controller: opponent) but currently uses ChooseOpponentCharacter which may not properly encode ownership
Second target should allow choosing any Character with cost 3 or less (not just opponent's), but uses ChooseOpponentCharacter
Effect should specify 'up to 1' for each target, requiring optional or max count of 1
